name: Mirrativ
description: Tokyo mobile-game live-streaming platform — Unity/Unreal SDKs for in-app broadcasting and chat.

seo.title: Mirrativ — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Mirrativ: Tokyo mobile-game live-streaming platform — Unity/Unreal SDKs for in-app broadcasting and chat.

when_to_use: In-app live streaming SDK for Japanese mobile games
Unity/Unreal broadcasting to game communities in real-time
Low-latency in-game streaming with viewer interaction features
Social streaming integration for Japanese mobile gaming apps
Real-time viewer chat and gifting during gameplay streams

pros: SDKs tuned for mobile game live streaming
Proven at scale in JP gaming market
cons: Heavier business-side partnership than a raw API
review.verdict: Only relevant if you are building mobile game streaming, especially for the Japanese market.
review.best_for: Mobile game studios adding in-app streaming and community
review.not_for: Non-gaming apps or generic video conferencing use cases
